caption: A woman with light brown hair styled in twists and wearing black headphones sits in a recording studio. She is dressed in a black t-shirt featuring a white logo. In front of her is a professional microphone on a stand. To her left is a monitor displaying the word "Johnson" in red. To her right is a black wall with a yellow vertical border. On-screen text overlays include "BOSS TALK 101" and a smaller "PODCAST" logo. The woman is speaking and smiling throughout the sequence, glancing slightly downward and then toward the side. Between the frames, her facial expression shifts as she continues to talk, though her position and the surrounding equipment remain stationary. Other text on the background walls reads "Employee Only."
